name: Coolify
description: Self-hosted PaaS for deploying applications. Monitor servers and service access.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Coolify instance
2. Go to Settings > API
3. Generate a new API token
4. Enter your instance URL and the API token below

credentialFields.label: Coolify Instance URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Coolify instance URL (e.g. https://coolify.example.com or https://app.coolify.io for Coolify Cloud)

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Go to your Coolify instance > Settings > API > Generate new token

checks.name: Coolify App Availability
checks.description: Checks that the Coolify API is accessible.

checks.name: Coolify Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies employee access to Coolify via API.
